evidence_snippet: During the first year of the reign of King Aenys I Targaryen, Harren the Red was the first of four rebels who rose against the Iron Throne.
In the battle that followed, Harren killed Lord Stokeworth, but was killed in turn by Alyn's squire, Bernarr Brune.
